value.found_quote:
### Custom Subagents
Agents can define their own custom subagents dynamically using the `define_subagent` tool.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes "Custom Subagents" as a capability within Google Antigravity 2.0, where agents can define their own custom subagents dynamically using the define_subagent tool. It is presented as a current capability with no preview or deprecation markers.
